We’ll also join the Kids and Clays foundation in Florida as they host an event that will most certainly touch your soul.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Across the country, deer season to many Americans is a rite of passage. For generations, Winchester has been the trusted ammunition choice for hunters…and it’s been a decade since the game-changing Deer Season XP whitetail line was introduced. In this episode, we’ll celebrate the many successes by Team Winchester hunters in the field during whitetail and mule deer firearm seasons across the United States. GUESTS: Melissa Bachman (Team Winchester) Mark Drury (Team Winchester) Nikki Boxler (Team Winchester) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester) Jason Gilbertson (Team Winchester)

programme.desc: Don't sleep on the summer panfish bite! The lion's share of panfishing occurs during the springtime when the fish are concentrated in the shallow waters and also in the winter, but summertime can be absolutely fantastic for bluegill and crappie. Just like other gamefish, they can make dramatic seasonal movements and you'll need to find them first before you can catch them. Today, we're joined by panfish aficionado Joel Nelson.

programme.title: Airtime Ep40: Nelscott Reef Tow-In Surfing Championships - Oregon Coast
programme.desc: Nelscott Reef lies just off the coast of Oregon and is home to a cold, savage wave that only appears 1-2 times per year, but when the conditions are right this awe inspiring wave can reach heights of up to 50-feet. The Nelscott Reef Tow-In Surf Championships involve the world’s best big-wave tow-in surfers including World Champion Garrett MacNamara and XXL champion Brad Gerlach who, along with 20 other world-class surfers, attempt to tame this monster of the sea.

programme.desc: Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann) and UFC Hall of Famer Ken Shamrock (Surviving Mann) uncover a breakthrough changing how we live in a world full of invisible forces. Join them as Aires Tech reveals the science behind a revolutionary technology built to protect the human body from electromagnetic stress—empowering performance in a wired world.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: A Finnish defense course tests the contestants' marksmanship and combat medical training. Later, Don serves dinner with a twist. To cap off the competition, the two teams face off in a sniper hide “cat and mouse” challenge. Find out who wins this legendary All Star competition.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: This morning, the All-Stars are pulled up by their bootstraps to compete for a chance to win The Golden Boy. Who will rise to the occasion in this Western-themed challenge and take home a piece of true American craftsmanship? Next, the training turns cerebral with the help of BlazePod. With mental fortitude playing a critical role in mission success, Don goes above and beyond to ensure the contestants are mentally—and physically—ready for battle. Later, the team is introduced to a groundbreaking product designed to reduce draw time while under enemy fire.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Laura’s search for farm heroes leads her to White Cloud, Kansas to meet with Ray Archuleta who is inspiring an entire generation of agricultural trailblazers. In order to prove how vital soil health is to farming, Ray and Laura get their hands dirty in the fields to collect samples. With three samples in tow, its back to the lab they go to try out Ray’s rain simulator. How will the farm samples stack up? Let’s find out.

programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary
programme.desc: Coach Bill Tierney is a legend. Over his five decade coaching career, he's accomplished almost everything: NCAA Championships, Coach of the Year honors, induction into the Hall of Fame. The last accomplishment left for his resume? programme.title: S1E1 Driven
programme.desc:
GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN takes you deep inside the world of Supercross and Motocross champion James Stewart. Ride alongside the man known as the fastest on two wheels as he shares the highs, lows, and relentless drive that shaped his legendary career.
GoPro Original Series DRIVEN also follows X Games star and snowmobile icon Chris Burandt. Join him on a thrilling journey to discover what fuels his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. This is raw, high-octane storytelling you can’t miss.

programme.title: S1E2 Driven
programme.desc: In this episode of GoPro Original Series DRIVEN, we continue our in-depth look at X Games star and snowmobile legend Chris Burandt. Join him on an adrenaline-fueled journey to uncover what drives his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. The second part goes inside the life of three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano. Watch as he pushes the limits on the track and discovers how he uses his racing platform to make a difference in the lives of others.

programme.title: Honor Of The Range - 1934
programme.desc: A singing cowboy rides into a troubled frontier community where corruption and deception threaten honest ranchers. As he uncovers a scheme involving land and cattle, he uses both his charm and courage to expose the villains and restore justice on the range.

programme.title: The Squaw Man (1931)
programme.desc: An English aristocrat accused of a crime he did not commit flees to the American West, where he starts a new life and falls in love with a Native American woman. As he builds a future on the frontier, his past returns to threaten the family he has created, forcing him to face difficult choices between honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Land of Hunted Men (1943)
programme.desc: The Range Busters set out to capture a gang of fugitives hiding in the hills, uncovering a scheme of robbery and deception as they pursue the outlaws and work to restore justice to the territory.

programme.title: Six-Gun Rhythm (1939)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy comes to the aid of a young woman who is being cheated out of her rightful inheritance by a gang of crooked outlaws. Using his musical talents and sharpshooting skills, he works to expose the villains and restore justice.

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies (1937)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy heads to the Rockies where he becomes involved in a dispute between ranchers and troublemakers threatening the peace of the region. With courage, quick thinking, and a few songs along the way, he works to restore order and protect those in danger.

programme.title: White Comanche 1968
programme.desc: In White Comanche, William Shatner takes on a daring double role as twin brothers—one a peace-seeking drifter, the other a ruthless Comanche warrior bent on bloodshed. As the frontier town reels from raids and rising violence, the brothers are set on a collision course that can only end in a deadly showdown. Filled with tense standoffs, frontier action, and Shatner’s commanding presence, this Spaghetti Western delivers a tale of fate, family, and vengeance.

programme.title: Sweet Success
programme.desc: A dirty laboratory and a vacation lead to the discovery of our first real weapon against bacteria - penicillin.
